ayIconColor(marker) {
        const { severity } = marker.data;
        switch (severity) {
            case 1: return 'var(--theia-list-errorForeground)';
            case 2: return 'var(--theia-list-warningForeground)';
            default: return 'var(--theia-successBackground)';
        }
    }
};
